   "reasoning":"I'm calling for immediate injection of funds to stabilize teacher retention and class sizes. Meanwhile, a watered-down scholarship might be a lost cause when the average student has little motivation anyway. I'm counting on transparency to shame the bottom-performing schools into doing better, but honestly, I think that's wishful thinking. What really matters is getting some new, actually capable teachers in the door.",
